title: OCGN Analyst Expectations and Price Targets 2024-2025
text: OCGN Analyst Expectations and Price Targets. Price Target Consensus: 4 analysts covering Ocugen stock have a consensus rating of Strong Buy and an average price target of $9.75, which forecasts a 438.67% increase in stock price. Lowest target: $7.00. Highest target: $12.00. Alternative consensus shows average price target of $12.33 with high forecast of $22.00 and low forecast of $8.00, representing 519.60% upside from $1.99. Analyst Ratings: 13 Buy Ratings, 35 Hold Ratings, 0 Sell Ratings. All four recommendations deriving current ABR are Strong Buy, representing 100% of all recommendations. Sentiment: Consensus among analysts is strongly bullish on OCGN, with all ratings being Strong Buy or Buy and optimistic price targets compared to historical trading levels.
